zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tibballs於1575年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛時，他的父親John Tibbals52歲，母親Joan Margaret Goodrich38歲。他於大約1600年與Avis Streame在英國薩默塞特韋斯特 巴波洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Tibballs于1575年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛时，他的父亲John Tibbals52岁，母亲Joan Margaret Goodrich38岁。他于大约1600年与Avis Streame在英国薩默塞特韋斯特 巴波洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Tibballs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tibbles
meanings: English (Hertfordshire): variant of Tibble , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tibballs was born in 1575, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Tibbals, was 52 and his mother, Joan Margaret Goodrich, was 38. He married Avis Streame about 1600, in West Bagborough, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He was buried in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Tibballs est né en 1575, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Tibbals, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Joan Margaret Goodrich, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Avis Streame environ 1600, à West Bagborough, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Ilenterré à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Tibballs 1575 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Tibbals 52 und seine Mutter Joan Margaret Goodrich 38. Er hat um 1600 in West Bagborough, Somerset, England Avis Streame geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er wurde in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tibballs è nato il nel 1575 nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Tibbals, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Joan Margaret Goodrich, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Avis Streame circa 1600, nel West Bagborough, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Fu sepolto a Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Tibballsが1575年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで生まれた時，父John Tibbalsは52歳，母Joan Margaret Goodrichは38歳であった。約1600年にイギリスソメルセトウエスト バグボロウでAvis Streameと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tibballs(이)가 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Tibbals(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Margaret Goodrich(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1600년 영국 서머세트 웨스트 바그버루에서 Avis Streame(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tibballs nasceu em 1575, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Tibbals, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Joan Margaret Goodrich, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Avis Streame aproximadamente 1600, em West Bagborough, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Tibballs родился в 1575 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Tibbals было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Margaret Goodrich, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Avis Streame около 1600 г. в местности вест багбороую, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Tibballs nació en 1575, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Tibbals, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Joan Margaret Goodrich, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Avis Streame aproximadamente 1600, en West Bagborough, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Fue sepultado en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
